title: Specialized Information and Referral * Older Adult/Aging Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Specialized Information and Referral * Older Adult/Aging Issues 8 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Assistive Technology Issues Blindness Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Deafness Disabilities Issues Down Syndrome Mental Health Issues Older Adult/Aging Issues Immigration Issues Abused Lesbians/Gay Individuals Abused Transgender Individuals LGBTQ2+ Issues Transgender Individuals Offender/Ex-Offender Issues Native American Community AIDS/HIV Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ACCESS OUTREACH TO SENIORS AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outreach to offer specialized support to vulnerable community members, helping them live independently in safe and healthy environments. Through home visits and referrals, the program assesses living situations, identifies needs, and connects individuals with appropriate resources. Assistance may include information, referrals to community partners or other agencies, and occasional emergency services. 3630 Aviation Way Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 779-6691 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FRIENDLY HOUSE SENIOR SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information and referrals for senior services such as senior law assistance, energy assistance outreach, and transportation coordination. Care coordination is available. 1737 NW 26th Avenue Portland, OR 97210 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and their caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 224-2640 Get Directions Visit Website More Details IMMIGRANT AND REFUGEE COMMUNITY ORGANIZATION SENIOR SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides home delivered meals, naturalization assistance, homebound assistance, limited transportation assistance, case management, health and wellness activities, and focal point leadership for older adults and their caregivers. An Information and Assistance specialist is available to provide information and referrals. 10301 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Age 60 and older. Some services have income eligibility criteria. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Meals: Varies Email (503) 484-6371 Get Directions Visit Website More Details IMMIGRANT AND REFUGEE COMMUNITY ORGANIZATION IRCO AFRICA HOUSE SENIOR SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides home delivered meals, naturalization assistance, homebound assistance, limited transportation assistance, case management, health and wellness activities, and focal point leadership for older adults and their caregivers. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Meals: Varies (503) 484-8800 Get Directions Visit Website More Details IMPACT NW IMPACT NW SOUTHEAST MULTICULTURAL SENIOR CENTER SENIOR SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services to older adults such as information and assistance/referral, Senior Law Project, and AARP tax preparation assistance. 4610 SE Belmont Street Portland, OR 97215 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and caregivers for older adults Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 721-6760 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEIGHBORHOOD HOUSE NEIGHBORHOOD HOUSE MAIN OFFICE NEIGHBORHOOD HOUSE SENIOR SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include specialized information and assistance, transportation scheduling, and wellness programs that includes foot care. 8959 SW Barbur Boulevard Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Age 55 and older Hours: Tuesday-Friday 9am-3:30pm Email (541) 246-1663 Get Directions Visit Website More Details USAGING ELDERCARE LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with locating services and advocating for older adults. The Eldercare locator database is designed to link older adults and their caregivers to unbiased information and assistance resources at the state and community level. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 5am-6pm, after-hours leave a message Email (800) 677-1116 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ACCESS OUTREACH TO SENIORS AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES FRIENDLY HOUSE SENIOR SERVICES IMMIGRANT AND REFUGEE COMMUNITY ORGANIZATION SENIOR SERVICES IMMIGRANT AND REFUGEE COMMUNITY ORGANIZATION SENIOR SERVICES IMMIGRANT AND REFUGEE COMMUNITY ORGANIZATION SENIOR SERVICES IMPACT NW SENIOR SERVICES NEIGHBORHOOD HOUSE NEIGHBORHOOD HOUSE SENIOR SERVICES
